changeSet.author: atrigo

column.name: user_id
column.remarks: The id of the user, fk to users.user_id

column.name: access_token_jwt
column.remarks: The JSON web token of the access token

column.name: access_token_issued_at
column.remarks: Issue date of the access token

column.name: access_token_expires_at
column.remarks: Expiration date of the access token

column.name: refresh_token_jwt
column.remarks: The JSON web token of the refresh token

column.name: refresh_token_issued_at
column.remarks: Issue date of the refresh token

column.name: refresh_token_expires_at
column.remarks: Expiration date of the refresh token

changeSet.comment: Creates the Jwt authentication table with columns user_id, access_token_jwt, access_token_issued_at, access_token_expires_at, refresh_token_jwt, refresh_token_issued_at, refresh_token_expires_at, then creates the foreign key with user table and finally creates an index for user_id field
